item.dc:creator: Gary Grumbach
Dareh Gregorian
item.description: A federal judge temporarily blocked the Trump administration from closing the John F. Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts for repairs and ordered that it be removed from the building and its website.

media:content.media:text: The Kennedy Center in Washington, D.C.
media:content.media:description: A federal judge ordered that the Kennedy Center remove President Donald Trump's name from the Kennedy Center building.

item.title: Judge temporarily halts Kennedy Center closure and orders Trump’s name be removed from the building

item.dc:creator: Jane C. Timm
item.description: Louisiana Republicans approved a new congressional map Friday, eliminating one of the state’s two majority-Black districts and drawing an additional Republican-leaning district in its place

media:content.media:text: Louisiana government
media:content.media:description: The Louisiana state Capitol in Baton Rouge, La., on April 4, 2023.

item.title: Louisiana passes new congressional map, dismantling one majority-Black district

item.dc:creator: Nicole Acevedo
Daniella Silva
item.description: Christian Castro was taken into custody on charges of assault and falsely reporting a crime in connection with the Jan. shooting in Minneapolis of Julio Sosa-Celis during an attempted immigration arrest.

media:content.media:text: US-IMMIGRATION-ICE-SHOOTING
media:content.media:description: Federal law enforcement agents and police officers in riot gear face off with protesters in Minneapolis, Minn. on Jan. 14.

item.title: ICE agent charged in Minneapolis shooting is arrested in Texas

item.dc:creator: Denise Chow
item.description: The giant explosion during a test of a Blue Origin rocket is a problem both for Jeff Bezos’ space company and for NASA.

media:content.media:text: Image: Explosion of Blue Origin rocket at Cape Canaveral
media:content.media:description: The Blue Origin rocket explosion in Cape Canaveral, Fla., on Thursday.

media:content.media:text: Image: Explosion of Blue Origin rocket at Cape Canaveral
media:content.media:description: The Blue Origin rocket explosion in Cape Canaveral, Fla., on Thursday.

item.title: Blue Origin’s rocket explosion is a big setback for NASA’s moon goals

item.dc:creator: Rohan Nadkarni
item.description: ESPN’s Mike Breen will be the play-by-play man for his record-extending 21st straight NBA Finals this year. And for the first time, the New York native will be calling the team he grew up rooting for in the championship round.

media:content.media:text: Mike Breen.
media:content.media:description: Mike Breen in Minneapolis on April 25.

media:content.media:text: Josh Hart and Jalen Brunson of the New York Knicks congratulate Walt Frazier and Mike Breen.
media:content.media:description: Mike Breen in Minneapolis on April 25.

item.title: The NBA Finals are a reward for long-suffering Knicks fans — and this broadcaster

item.dc:creator: Shiv Sudhakar, M.D.
item.description: Flu season may be mostly behind us, but levels of norovirus, the nasty, highly contagious stomach bug, are rising, according to wastewater data.

media:content.media:text: Pacific Crest trail.
media:content.media:description: Southbound hikers walk toward Pinchot Pass on the Pacific Crest Trail in California.

item.title: Vomiting virus is spreading across most of the U.S.

item.description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

media:content.media:title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio
media:content.media:description: On the sidelines of the Trump-Xi Summit in Beijing, NBC News' Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio to discuss China policy, the war with Iran, the future of Cuba, and more.

item.title: Extended Interview: Tom Llamas sits down with Secretary of State Marco Rubio

item.dc:creator: Jane Weaver
Jiachuan Wu
Javier Zarracina
item.description: Learn more about the deadly 2026 Ebola outbreak, including how many cases there are so far, which countries are most affected, how this outbreak compares with others in severity and more.

media:content.media:text: Red Cross workers carry a coffin containing the body of Dr. Tibenderana Katho Blaise, who worked at the Centre Medical Evangelique and died of Ebola virus, in Bunia, Democratic Republic of the Congo, on Tuesday.
media:content.media:description: Red Cross workers carry a coffin containing the body of Dr. Tibenderana Katho Blaise, who worked at the Centre Medical Evangelique and died of Ebola virus, in Bunia, Democratic Republic of the Congo, on Tuesday.

media:content.media:text: Red Cross workers carry a coffin containing the body of Dr. Tibenderana Katho Blaise, who worked at the Centre Medical Evangelique and died of Ebola virus, in Bunia, Democratic Republic of the Congo, on Tuesday.
media:content.media:description: Red Cross workers carry a coffin containing the body of Dr. Tibenderana Katho Blaise, who worked at the Centre Medical Evangelique and died of Ebola virus, in Bunia, Democratic Republic of the Congo, on Tuesday.

media:content.media:text: Red Cross workers carry a coffin containing the body of Dr. Tibenderana Katho Blaise, who worked at the Centre Medical Evangelique and died of Ebola virus, in Bunia, Democratic Republic of the Congo, on Tuesday.
media:content.media:description: Red Cross workers carry a coffin containing the body of Dr. Tibenderana Katho Blaise, who worked at the Centre Medical Evangelique and died of Ebola virus, in Bunia, Democratic Republic of the Congo, on Tuesday.

item.title: Tracking the Ebola outbreak: Where the deadly virus is spreading and how the U.S. is responding

item.dc:creator: Gordon Lubold
Gary Grumbach
Courtney Kube
item.description: WASHINGTON — The Defense Department is requiring members of the military to meet a certain body type criteria in order to attend the big Ultimate Fighting Championship event at the White House next month, according to two people familiar with the criteria and a Pentagon memo outlining the criteria that was reviewed by NBC News

media:content.media:text: President Trump's Ongoing Construction At The White House And Repainting Of The Reflecting Pool
media:content.media:description: Construction continued Tuesday for the upcoming June 14th UFC match on the South Lawn of the White House in Washington, D.C.

item.title: No heavyweights allowed: Troops must meet fitness criteria to attend White House UFC event

item.dc:creator: Daniella Silva
Laura Strickler
Julia Ainsley
Helen Graham
item.description: Democratic Gov. Mikie Sherill announced that the state would establish a protected peaceful protest zone outside Delaney Hall as she reiterated calls to shut down the facility.

media:content.media:text: Immigration Advocates Demonstrate And Clash With Officers Outside Delaney Hall Detention Facility In Newark
media:content.media:description: ICE agents use a chemical irritant as they clash Thursday with protesters outside of the federal immigration center at Delaney Hall, in Newark, N.J., where ICE is housing detained immigrants.

item.title: N.J. establishes protected zone around ICE facility after several protesters are arrested during clashes

item.dc:creator: Denise Chow

item.title: Blue Origin’s rocket explosion is a big setback for NASA’s moon goals

item.dc:creator: Francie Ebert
item.description: A lounge chair sold on Amazon is being recalled after a report that an individual’s finger was amputated while adjusting the chair, officials said Thursday.

media:content.media:text: Recalled Giantex Lounge Chair, Model Number NP10025NY.
media:content.media:description: Recalled Giantex Lounge Chair, Model Number NP10025NY.

item.title: Lounge chair sold on Amazon recalled after person’s finger amputated

item.dc:creator: Gary Grumbach
Dareh Gregorian
item.description: A federal judge temporarily blocked the Trump administration from closing the John F. Kennedy Center for the Performing Arts for repairs and ordered that it be removed from the building and its website.

item.dc:creator: Rohan Nadkarni
Andrew Greif
Greg Rosenstein
item.description: With their backs against the wall, the San Antonio Spurs staved off elimination in the Western Conference finals to set up a highly anticipated Game 7 against the Oklahoma City Thunder.

media:content.media:text: Victor Wembanyama of the San Antonio Spurs drives to the basket
media:content.media:description: Victor Wembanyama of the San Antonio Spurs drives to the basket against Chet Holmgren of the Oklahoma City Thunder last night.

media:content.media:text: Shai Gilgeous-Alexander of the Oklahoma City Thunder drives around Carter Bryant and Victor Wembanyama of the San Antonio Spurs on May 28, 2026.
media:content.media:description: Victor Wembanyama of the San Antonio Spurs drives to the basket against Chet Holmgren of the Oklahoma City Thunder last night.

media:content.media:text: Netherlands v Ecuador - International Friendly
media:content.media:description: Victor Wembanyama of the San Antonio Spurs drives to the basket against Chet Holmgren of the Oklahoma City Thunder last night.

item.title: From The Sports Desk: Game 7 incoming

item.dc:creator: Corky Siemaszko
item.description: The former superintendent of Iowa’s largest school district was sentenced Friday to two years in federal prison for falsely claiming to be a U.S. citizen.“I regret what I’ve done every single day,” Ian Roberts said before U.S.

media:content.media:text: Superintendent Ian Roberts speaking
media:content.media:description: Ian Roberts, former superintendent of the Des Moines school district, in 2025.

item.title: Ex-head of Des Moines schools sentenced to 2 years in prison for misrepresenting U.S. citizenship

item.title: Louisiana passes new congressional map, dismantling one majority-Black district

item.dc:creator: Minyvonne Burke
item.description: Drag queen and environmentalist Pattie Gonia asked the outdoor apparel company Patagonia to drop its trademark infringement lawsuit, saying it could lead to the erasure of the activist’s name and advocacy.

media:content.media:text: Drag Queen Pattie Gonia Performs at Mountain Film Festival
media:content.media:description: Drag queen and environmentalist Pattie Gonia in Telluride, Colo., in 2024.

item.title: Drag queen Pattie Gonia asks apparel company Patagonia to drop trademark infringement lawsuit

item.dc:creator: Francie Ebert
item.description: Eight riders were stranded nearly 100 feet in the air on Thursday evening after a roller coaster in Texas stopped during its vertical climb.

media:content.media:text: Eight passengers had to be rescued on May 28, 2026, from a roller coaster that got stuck after a malfunction at Pleasure Pier in Galveston, Texas.
media:content.media:description: Eight passengers had to be rescued on May 28, 2026, from a roller coaster that got stuck after a malfunction at Pleasure Pier in Galveston, Texas.

item.title: Texas roller coaster malfunction leaves riders stranded 100 feet in the air for hours

item.dc:creator: Steve Kopack
item.description: The price of crude oil in May recorded its biggest one-month decline in six years, delivering some relief to consumers.

media:content.media:text: Midwest Pump Prices Are Spiking At The Worst Possible Time For Trump
media:content.media:description: A driver finishes refueling a vehicle with regular gasoline at a GetGo gas station in Columbus, Ohio, on May 11, 2026.

item.title: Oil records its biggest one-month drop in six years, bringing consumers some relief

item.dc:creator: Sahil Kapur
item.description: Rep. Haley Stevens, D-Mich., seemed to give conflicting answers about what to do about the Senate’s 60-vote filibuster rule during a wide-ranging Senate Democratic primary debate Thursday.“The filibuster must go so that we can codify health care,” Stevens said, while adding: “We should use the filibuster to not allow the big ugly bill to pass that increased our debt.”It was a reference to President Donald Trump’s so-called big, beautiful bill that extended his 2017 tax cuts.

media:content.media:text: Breast Cancer Rally
media:content.media:description: Rep. Haley Stevens (D-MI) speaks in front of the Capitol on May 6.

item.title: Haley Stevens’ campaign clarifies filibuster stance after Michigan Democratic debate

item.dc:creator: Nick Duffy
Nat Sumon
item.description: Rescuers have begun removing miners trapped in a flooded cave in Laos for more than a week, with video showing the efforts as they ran late into the night local time.

media:content.media:text: A man is rescued from a cave in Laos on May 29, 2026.
media:content.media:description: A man is rescued from a cave in Laos on May 29, 2026.

item.title: Man rescued after more than a week trapped in flooded cave in Laos

item.dc:creator: Cory Fernandez
Cory Fernandez
Bethany Heitman
item.description: I found the best methods and products for cleaning glasses, including reading glasses, sunglasses and more. Optometrists recommend the best cleaning products.

media:content.media:text: A microfiber cloth is one of the best options for cleaning glasses since it won’t leave streaks.
media:content.media:description: A microfiber cloth is one of the best options for cleaning glasses since it won’t leave streaks.

media:content.media:text: A microfiber cloth is one of the best options for cleaning glasses since it won’t leave streaks.
media:content.media:description: A microfiber cloth is one of the best options for cleaning glasses since it won’t leave streaks.

item.title: This is how you should actually be cleaning your glasses

item.dc:creator: Bianca Alvarez
item.description: Bar soaps work as effectively as body washes and I rounded up editor-approved picks from Dove, L’Occitane, Avène and more.

media:content.media:text: Yes, they clean your skin, but they can also combat acne, dryness and uneven texture.
media:content.media:description: Yes, they clean your skin, but they can also combat acne, dryness and uneven texture.

media:content.media:text: Yes, they clean your skin, but they can also combat acne, dryness and uneven texture.
media:content.media:description: Yes, they clean your skin, but they can also combat acne, dryness and uneven texture.

item.title: Bar soaps vs. body wash — which is best for your skin?

item.dc:creator: Bethany Heitman
item.description: Sandals are notoriously not great for lots of walking. These podiatrists-approved sandals have built-in arch support and cushioning to keep you comfortable.

media:content.media:text: According to podiatrists, the key to a comfy sandal is built-in arch support and thick, secure straps.
media:content.media:description: According to podiatrists, the key to a comfy sandal is built-in arch support and thick, secure straps.

media:content.media:text: According to podiatrists, the key to a comfy sandal is built-in arch support and thick, secure straps.
media:content.media:description: According to podiatrists, the key to a comfy sandal is built-in arch support and thick, secure straps.

item.title: 6 podiatrist-approved sandals to comfortably walk in all summer
